title: Research Data Explorer: Multi-source health and development data via open APIs
description: A single-file, zero-build HTML application for exploring international health and development indicators across World Bank WDI, WHO/UNAIDS/JHU (via Our World in Data), and the IHME Global Burden of Disease study. Features natural-language bilingual (Japanese/English) search, interactive world map, time-series charts, CSV export, and user-uploadable IHME CSVs. Extensible to any indicator via small JavaScript adapters.
